Documentation

Technical documentation lives in the GitHub repository. The links below go directly to the relevant docs.

Architecture

System design, data model, and technology choices.

Local Development

How to set up a local development environment.

API Reference

REST API endpoints, request/response shapes, and authentication.

Security Model

Role-based access, audit logs, and data handling.

Funding Radar

Grant management module documentation.

Deployment

Self-hosting and deployment configuration.

Contributing to docs

Documentation improvements are some of the most valuable contributions to an open-source project. If you find something unclear or missing, pull requests are welcome.

Contribution guide →
Open Paw

Free, open-source, local-first software for animal rescues, shelters, and welfare teams.

License: AGPL-3.0 — Built for the people doing the work.
